name: piclaw
description: Personal pi coding agent assistant. Lightweight nanoclaw-style orchestrator using Bun and pi.

scripts.build:web: mkdir -p web/static/js/utils web/static/js/components web/static/js/ui && cp web/src/app.ts web/static/js/app.js && cp web/src/api.ts web/static/js/api.js && cp web/src/markdown.ts web/static/js/markdown.js && cp web/src/utils/format.ts web/static/js/utils/format.js && for f in web/src/components/*.ts; do cp "$f" "web/static/js/components/$(basename "$f" .ts).js"; done && for f in web/src/ui/*.ts; do cp "$f" "web/static/js/ui/$(basename "$f" .ts).js"; done
